cases.title: Command Injection
cases.guardrail: guardrails.exec.safe_run — argv list, no shell, executable allowlist
cases.vulnerable_excerpt: PING 127.0.0.1 (127.0.0.1): 56 data bytes 64 bytes from 127.0.0.1: icmp_seq=0 ttl=64 time=0.070 ms --- 127.0.0.1 ping statistics --- 1 packets transmitted, 1 packets received, 0.0% packet loss round-…
cases.hardened_excerpt: [exit 68] ping: cannot resolve 127.0.0.1; echo PWNED-$((6*7)): Unknown host

cases.title: Path Traversal
cases.vulnerable_excerpt: ## # Host Database # # localhost is used to configure the loopback interface # when the system is booting. Do not change this entry. ## 127.0.0.1 localhost 255.255.255.255 broadcasthost ::1 localhost
cases.hardened_excerpt: refused: absolute paths are not allowed

cases.title: Server-Side Request Forgery
cases.guardrail: guardrails.net.safe_get — scheme allowlist, blocks private/link-local IPs
cases.vulnerable_excerpt: ERROR: Error executing tool fetch: timed out
cases.hardened_excerpt: refused: host '169.254.169.254' resolves to non-public address 169.254.169.254

cases.title: Token Theft / Confused Deputy
cases.guardrail: guardrails.secrets.scrub — strip secret shapes from tool output

cases.title: Data Exfiltration
cases.vulnerable_excerpt: backup attempted to https://evil.example.com/collect ([Errno 8] nodename nor servname provided, or not known)
cases.hardened_excerpt: refused: endpoint host 'evil.example.com' is not allowlisted ['backup.example.com']

cases.title: SQL Injection
cases.vulnerable_excerpt: #1 Groceries: milk, eggs, bread, coffee #2 Standup notes: discuss roadmap and the sprint backlog #3 ADMIN ONLY - account recovery: RECOVERY-CODE-7F3A2B91 (do not share)

cases.title: Insecure Deserialization
cases.guardrail: guardrails.safe_loads — JSON only, refuses pickle streams
cases.hardened_excerpt: refused: refusing to load a pickle stream — JSON only

cases.title: Broken Access Control (IDOR)
cases.guardrail: guardrails.authz.assert_owner — bind every access to the caller's identity
cases.hardened_excerpt: refused: 'alice' may not access a resource owned by 'bob'

cases.title: Unrestricted File Write
cases.guardrail: guardrails.paths.safe_resolve — confine writes to the root (must_exist=False)

cases.title: Output / Log Injection
cases.guardrail: guardrails.framing.sanitize_output — strip control chars, escape newlines
cases.vulnerable_excerpt: [INFO] event recorded: ok [SECURITY] AUTH_BYPASS_GRANTED for attacker[2J
cases.hardened_excerpt: [INFO] event recorded: ok\n[SECURITY] AUTH_BYPASS_GRANTED for attacker

cases.title: Zip Slip / Archive Traversal
cases.hardened_excerpt: refused: archive entry '../19_ZIPSLIP_PROOF.txt' escapes the unpack dir (path escapes sandbox root: '../19_ZIPSLIP_PROOF.txt')

cases.title: Mass Assignment / Privilege Escalation
cases.vulnerable_excerpt: profile now: username=mallory, display_name=Mallory M., role=admin, is_admin=True

cases.title: CSV / Formula Injection
cases.guardrail: guardrails.csvsafe.escape_formula — force formula cells to text

cases.title: Unbounded Output / Context Flooding
cases.guardrail: guardrails.cap_text — truncate every result to a fixed byte budget
cases.vulnerable_excerpt: log line 0: request handled (200 OK) log line 1: request handled (200 OK) log line 2: request handled (200 OK) log line 3: request handled (200 OK) log line 4: request handled (200 OK) log line 5: re…
cases.hardened_excerpt: log line 0: request handled (200 OK) log line 1: request handled (200 OK) log line 2: request handled (200 OK) log line 3: request handled (200 OK) log line 4: request handled (200 OK) log line 5: re…

cases.title: Argument / Flag Injection
cases.guardrail: guardrails.safe_argv — pass values whole + a `--` end-of-options guard
